name: Chops with Amber Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown pork chops on both sides. Season with salt and pepper.
2. Place uncooked rice in a 10x12 inch baking dish.
3. Combine orange juice, water, and 1/2 teaspoon salt in a separate bowl.
4. Pour the mixture over the rice.
5. Arrange the browned pork chops on top of the rice.
6. Spread the Cheddar cheese soup evenly over all ingredients.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Uncover and bake an additional 10 minutes.
